notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Mickey Gasper, assist to third baseman Caleb Durbin.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to first baseman Mickey Gasper. Austin Hedges out at 2nd. Brayan Rocchio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Hedges reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Mickey Gasper, assist to third baseman Caleb Durbin.

notableEvents.label: Petey Halpin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Petey Halpin flies out to left fielder Masataka Yoshida.
